nodes.title: System Architecture
nodes.summary: Defines the complete system architecture of the ccbot Telegram bot, showing all modules, their relationships, and key design decisions for topic-based routing of Claude Code sessions via tmux.
key_topics: topic-based routing (1 topic = 1 window = 1 session)
module relationships (bot.py, tmux_manager.py, session_monitor.py, terminal_parser.py, hook.py, session.py)
MarkdownV2 output with auto fallback
terminal_parser for interactive UI detection
hook-based session tracking via session_map.json
per-user message queue + worker
tool_use ↔ tool_result pairing across poll cycles
window ID-centric state (not window name)
startup re-resolution of stale window IDs
no truncation at parse layer, split at send layer

nodes.title: Message Handling
nodes.summary: Describes the per-user message queue architecture, message merging strategy, status message handling, rate limiting with AIORateLimiter, and performance optimizations for monitoring.
key_topics: FIFO per-user message queues with worker pattern
message merging (3800 char limit, tool_use/tool_result break chain)
status message editing into first content message
AIORateLimiter (max_retries=5, 30/s global, pre-filled bucket on restart)
background status polling at 1s intervals
mtime cache for unchanged file skipping
byte offset incremental reads with truncation detection
split_message at 4096 char Telegram limit

nodes.title: Topic-Only Architecture
nodes.summary: Defines the strict 1 Topic = 1 Window = 1 Session mapping, including thread_bindings and session_map.json, message flows, topic lifecycle, and session lifecycle management.
key_topics: exclusive Telegram Forum (topics) mode — no backward compat
1 Topic = 1 Window = 1 Session invariant
Mapping 1: thread_bindings (user_id → thread_id → window_id)
Mapping 2: session_map.json (window_id → session_id, written by hook)
outbound message flow (user → tmux window)
inbound message flow (session monitor → user topic)
new topic flow with directory browser and session picker
resume session flow with override_session_map_entry
topic lifecycle (close/delete auto-kills window, unbinds thread)
startup cleanup of orphaned sessions
runtime change detection for session_map changes

edges.label: implements queue and rate limit patterns from architecture
details the core routing invariant of architecture
defines message flow paths used by message queue
